The '''thermal detonator trooper''', also known as '''grenade trooper''', was one of the classes of ground units which was deployed during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Strategically positioned behind front-lines, mortar troopers played a key role in combat by providing medium-ranged supporting fire for other [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] ground troops, launching [[Mortar/Legends|mortars]] and [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]]. They served with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] duringt the [[Krantian Civil War]].<ref name="GB" /> As part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], they later fought alongside [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Rand Talor]] during [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]].<ref name="GB:CC" />
